# model

**Instance Property**

The manufacturer’s model name for the electric vehicle.

## Declaration

```swift
var model: String? { get }
```

## Discussion

Maps displays this value when it presents information about the electric vehicle.

## Getting the Car’s Attributes

- **make**: The electric vehicle’s manufacturer.
- **color**: The electric vehicle’s color.
- **year**: The electric vehicle’s year of manufacture.

items.description: The electric vehicle’s year of manufacture.
items.name: year
